chunks.text: I 'ORDER.SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P No.D-710 of 2016. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non prosecution 23'd Novemb er -2016. None present. None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. Same was the position on last two dates of hearings even leamed counsel has not supplied the sets and deposited the process fee. It appears that petitioner after filing this petition has lost his interest in this matter, therefore, this petition is dismissed on account of non- prosecution and non compliance alongwith listed applications. JUDGE Mt JUDGE T
